synced:
[00:06.75] Vintage tee, brand new phone
[00:10.35] High heels on cobblestones
[00:14.05] When you are young, they assume you know nothing
[00:18.71] 
[00:21.38] Sequin smile, black lipstick
[00:25.12] Sensual politics
[00:28.82] When you are young, they assume you know nothing
[00:33.19] 
[00:35.93] But I knew you
[00:38.18] Dancin' in your Levi's
[00:39.93] Drunk under a streetlight, I
[00:43.70] I knew you
[00:45.52] Hand under my sweatshirt
[00:47.53] Baby, kiss it better, I
[00:51.08] And when I felt like I was an old cardigan
[00:55.37] Under someone's bed
[00:58.45] You put me on and said I was your favorite
[01:02.79] 
[01:05.79] A friend to all is a friend to none
[01:09.43] Chase two girls, lose the one
[01:13.27] When you are young, they assume you know nothin'
[01:17.42] 
[01:20.36] But I knew you
[01:22.55] Playing hide-and-seek and
[01:24.43] Giving me your weekends, I
[01:28.05] I knew you
[01:29.74] Your heartbeat on the High Line
[01:31.70] Once in 20 lifetimes, I
[01:35.46] And when I felt like I was an old cardigan
[01:39.67] Under someone's bed
[01:42.81] You put me on and said I was your favorite
[01:48.31] 
[02:02.98] To kiss in cars and downtown bars
[02:06.65] Was all we needed
[02:10.21] You drew stars around my scars
[02:13.93] But now I'm bleedin'
[02:19.61] 'Cause I knew you
[02:21.57] Steppin' on the last train
[02:23.49] Marked me like a bloodstain, I
[02:27.19] I knew you
[02:29.00] Tried to change the ending
[02:30.72] Peter losing Wendy, I
[02:34.44] I knew you
[02:36.38] Leavin' like a father
[02:38.25] Running like water, I
[02:41.75] And when you are young, they assume you know nothing
[02:47.10] But I knew you'd linger like a tattoo kiss
[02:50.89] I knew you'd haunt all of my what-ifs
[02:54.62] The smell of smoke would hang around this long
[02:58.38] 'Cause I knew everything when I was young
[03:02.05] I knew I'd curse you for the longest time
[03:05.72] Chasin' shadows in the grocery line
[03:09.31] I knew you'd miss me once the thrill expired
[03:13.02] And you'd be standin' in my front porch light
[03:16.69] And I knew you'd come back to me
[03:20.57] You'd come back to me
[03:24.15] And you'd come back to me
[03:27.84] And you'd come back
[03:33.51] And when I felt like I was an old cardigan
[03:37.85] Under someone's bed
[03:41.00] You put me on and said I was your favorite
[03:44.50]
